text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't run as well as I thought I could. 
If only I tried harder out there…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's true… you have a point. I can reflect 
upon this all I want, but in the end, it's 
all just "a matter of chance."

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If I start demanding for all the reasons 
I lost, then that would be far too 
arrogant of me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright…! I'm going to properly rest 
today, and I'll be feeling chipper 
again by tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah. If this goes on, it'll become boring.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's win the next one and laugh 
together. For that sake…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna have to be strict on me. 
I'll surmount any headwind that blows 
my way.
